entries.question: cadence cycle は何を実行したか
entries.answer: At least one open task has never been triaged by the cadence loop. Current cadence guidance does not require follow-through beyond normal monitoring.
entries.expectation_state: cadence cycle can now self-start cadence processing when timing says due-now
entries.scale_direction: reduce remaining self-start ambiguity or remaining semantic input dependencies

entries.question: external cadence dispatch は何を実行したか
entries.expectation_state: external cadence scheduling can now hand off directly into cadence-cycle
entries.scale_direction: keep reducing any remaining semantic input dependencies inside cadence follow-through

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: cadence timing, dispatch state, and scheduler profile are still operator-facing only through raw .aof artifacts
entries.expectation_state: CI churn is now suppressed for .aof-only cadence commits, and cadence no-follow-through paths now stamp open tasks as triaged
entries.mismatch_state: cadence timing, dispatch state, and scheduler profile are still operator-facing only through raw .aof artifacts
entries.scale_direction: surface cadence timing, dispatch state, and scheduler profile through the existing human visibility contract
